title: 18" Rose Gold Heart, Star, Round Champagne Foil Balloons Pack of 6, Large Balloons with 10 m Roll Ribbon, Party Decorations
features: High quality for durable and reusable use. Really very affordable and not easy to break.
Inflate the balloons with Hydrogen and helium etc,it can float or you can also inflate with air but can not float. Please choose according to your need !
Suits for birthday party, wedding, anniversary, bar, concert, season holidays, cheer celebrations and any other decorations. Make your party a big hit and awesome !
Package include: 2 round, 2 star, 2 heart rose gold balloon, You can purchase multiple sets at once to have your party full of stars, hearts, round.
Automatic sealing, pinch the mouth after inflating the ball flat, the ball comes viscose mouth sealed automatically
